title: Glowing Ores! - Borderful Edition
description: a Resource pack that makes the Ores pop out a little more by giving it a Gradient outline and having support with "Optifine" and "Continuity" Mod! Which grants the Resource pack to glow due to the Emissive properties!
body:
# Glowing Ores! - Borderful Edition.

![Borderful Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/065a48edf2ff47b06f074ccb6227ee21b7aa8502_0.webp)

This resource pack was seperated from "Enhanced Visuals" due to some Members wanting the Glowing ores only and not get their other items affected. 

## THE ORES WONT GLOW WITHOUT HAVING ONE OF THESE THINGS INSTALLED!

### Forge
**Optifine** or **Continuity**

### Fabric
**Continuity**

**The Resource pack heavily relies on the Emissive properties used by Optifine/Continuity Client/Mod. Without it the resource pack will work but the glowing will be gone and there will be only a gradient outline.**


<details>
<summary>Mod Supports!</summary>

- Amarite
- Cobblemon
- Create (more to come soon)
- Diamond in the Rough
- Enerziged Power
- Exp Ores
- Galosphere
- [Let's Do!] Meadow
- Mekanism + Dense Mekanism (addon)
- Mythic Metals
- Ores to the Nether
- Powah
- Things
- Universal Ores
- Vic's Point Blank

</details>


<details>
<summary>Glowing Ores! - Borderless Edition</summary>

![Borderless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ecb7ea6759823b21d51a0d3e93cc7b030dadc01_0.webp)

# Borderless Edition.
As Highly requested by the community and a few friends of mine. **Borderless version** _(Without CTM)_ will **Release** which is specifically made for **immersion** as many people like the **glint along with the Shaders**!

[Borderless Edition!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-ores!-borderless-edition)

</details>

# Version 8.0 Release!
(banners to be made soon)

Added three new mod supports for the outlines! Universal Ores, [Let's Do!] Meadow, Cobblemon.

# Version 7.0 Release!
As a bigger version (we don't talk about 6.0) the pack has gained new mod supports! Thus being; Amarite, Mythic Metals, Things, etc.

![Amartie support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af8d9704de195a27f4ff1fd34ffc84ab12ed5bd.jpeg)

![MythicMetals Support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf68a213a7d0ffa6dc5557bd6aee8bce029198d.jpeg)

![Things Support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f914b0570c3514c1fb2bab8b0f4a68f3e1d329ee.png)

# Version 5.0 Release!
### Mod Support "Create"!
Supports over 30+ items adding a shiny animation effect and emissive effect just as other items!
Adds a outline over the "Zinc" block, making it shine in dark! (deepslate and stone variant)
![Create Mod!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e40904e978fe74eb0e72c5011c8d3752a14c3f15.png)

### Glinting Ores/Items!
Some ores that are actually metallic or shiny have been animated to "feel" satisfying. Made with purpose for easier Identification in Inventories when searching for ores! (Use it to sort it)

![Glinting Ores! (Animated)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b748ad56b1a8dfc8947e6eef9087db4080f20df1.gif)

### Suspicious Sand and Gravel!
Suspicious Sand and Suspicious Gravel! Now made easier to notice by making a very Obvious border around them that fits in.

![Suspicious Sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3cebbf36a45a5f27df226f33e7b5ba5fea1908c.gif)

![Suspicious Gravel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7bef141283cf2288dce6c9bf5ccc02e40d6c7ab.gif)

### Nether Quartz Ore
Nether Quartz Ore glints aswell! The shards are.. shiny of course.

![Nether Quartz Ore Glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad909d2492febc4080a6a9ab90b2539f4a1b0e10.gif)

### Ancient Debris
Ancient Debris has a Lava outline and Glint made specifically to fit in with the nether theme!

![Ancient Debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28921124b219b6f2ae092ba01226be9b54fbe9bd.gif)

### Ores are glinty!
Every ore now has a glint animation! And more blocks too!
![Ores glint!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/576e4008430d75317e2cc7d09a183960f4e90502.gif)
